description_long: This is a modern, high-back lounge chair with a deep, contoured seat and a tall, supportive backrest. The chair features plush, burgundy cushioning on both the seat and back, divided into two distinct padded sections for ergonomic comfort. The exterior shell and armrests are upholstered in sleek black material, providing a striking contrast to the inner surfaces. The chair is supported by four slender, slightly angled legs, also finished in black, giving it a stable yet elegant appearance. The overall design suggests a blend of comfort and sophistication, suitable for upscale urban environments such as lobbies, lounges, or waiting areas. The materials and construction indicate durability and a focus on user comfort.
description: A modern, high-back lounge chair with burgundy cushioning and a sleek black exterior, supported by four slender legs. The design emphasizes comfort and style, ideal for urban indoor settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the deep burgundy seat and back cushions, with the tall backrest and armrests clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the chair's contoured profile, the thickness of the cushioning, and the sleek black exterior shell.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, uninterrupted black back shell and the two rear legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the ergonomic curve and the integration of the armrest and backrest.
